sutta: once while the exalted 1 was staying at the gable hall in mahavana near vaisali the weber ananda came to him and saluted and sat down at 1 side associated he spoke thus to the exalted 1 lord how many qualities must a man have to be considered a spiritual advisor of nuns among mananda must have 8 qualities among is virtuous he undertakes and trains himself in the precepts he is learning the doctrines he has fully understood in theory to whom both party morka have been properly and fully handed down sectioned regulated and resolved into detail he has a pleasant voice his enunciation is good his speech is obeying distinct free from hoarseness and informative he is able to instruct inside rouse and gladden the sangha of nuns with religious discourse generally he is dear to and liked by the nuns previous to his taking this exalted 1 as his authority for going forth for donning the yellow robe he has been guilty of no serious crime he has been ordained 20 years or more among ananda must have these 8 qualities to be considered a spiritual advisor for nuns that's the end of the sutta
commentary: i just recapitulate these conditions and the first 1 among must be virtuous he keeps the precepts a second secondly he must be learned in the dhamma thirdly he the both parties the monks patimoka and the nuns patimoca he fully understands number 4 he has a pleasant voice number 5 he's able to instruct the nuns with religious discourse with the dhamma number 6 he is liked by the nuns number 7 he has been guilty of no serious crime number 8 he has been ordained 20 years or more among what's been ordained 10 years or more is called a terror monk who has been ordained 20 years or more is called a maha thera so these are the qualities the nexus is

items: able to instruct the nuns with religious discourse
